description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.name: Fleet & Corporate Charging Management: Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Fleet & Corporate Charging Management is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition).
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger fleet management and contract & customer management create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across Web Portal, Public APIs.

linkedInitiatives.description: Fleet & Corporate Charging Management initiative focused on improving fleet management, contract & customer management, strengthening customer value for Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition), and evolving delivery across Web Portal, Public APIs.

assignments.how: Leads the discovery framing, customer learning plan, and recommendation for how Fleet & Corporate Charging Management should prove value for Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition).
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on fleet management and contract & customer management.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on fleet management and contract & customer management.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on fleet management and contract & customer management.

assignments.teamName: Driver Identity & Experience - Ev Driver App
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on fleet management and contract & customer management.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on fleet management and contract & customer management.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) will choose Fleet & Corporate Charging Management because fleet management and contract & customer management solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) describes fleet management as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Fleet & Corporate Charging Management experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Fleet & Corporate Charging Management if fleet management and contract & customer management improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Fleet & Corporate Charging Management case.
Which KPI movement would make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) can understand and complete the core Fleet & Corporate Charging Management workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering fleet management and contract & customer management.
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Fleet & Corporate Charging Management within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind fleet management and contract & customer management.
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering fleet management and contract & customer management.
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across Web Portal, Public APIs.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Fleet & Corporate Charging Management opportunity.
